data_sources: India TB Report 2023, Central TB Division, MoHFW India (https://www.tbcindia.gov.in/)

national_statistics.source: WHO Global Tuberculosis Report 2023, Annex 2 (Table A2.1)

key_findings: India accounts for 27% of global TB burden (WHO 2023)
MDR-TB treatment success rate remains at 59% for 2019 cohort (WHO 2023)
New drug targets urgently needed given suboptimal treatment outcomes
